title: RE-RANK output — living roadmap with completed + re-ranked remaining slices

base_ref.description: Path to 07-sequence-reviewed.json (or previous 08-rerank.json) serving as the base order.

build_dag_ref.description: Path to build-dag.json providing the real component dependency graph.

components_ref.description: Path to components.json used to map slices to components.

completed_demo_refs.description: Paths to every accepted demo record read for this re-rank.

roadmap_version.description: Version counter; base 07 = v1; each re-rank increments.

verdict.description: re_ranked = at least one remaining slice moved or value/risk changed; unchanged = no material info; dependency_defect = real-DAG cycle/dangling.

completed.description: Accepted slices, pinned in order — never re-ranked. One row per accepted demo record.

position.description: Original sequence position of this completed slice.

demo_ref.description: Path to the demo record that accepted this slice.

introduction_map.description: Projection basis — maps the skeleton and each remaining slice to the components it introduces.

skeleton_built.description: Component C* ids introduced by the completed skeleton slice.

remaining.description: Map of remaining slice S* id to the component C* ids it introduces.

remaining_sequence.description: Re-ranked remaining slices; positions continue after completed set, ascending, no gaps. Empty when verdict:dependency_defect.

position.description: Position in the re-ranked sequence; continues after completed set.

id.description: Slice S* identifier carried verbatim from base.

name.description: Slice name carried verbatim from base.

value.description: Value tier verbatim from base; never re-scored unless a logged value_risk_change.

retires_risk.description: Risk retired verbatim from base, or null.

components.description: Component C* ids this slice introduces, from introduction_map.

coarse_depends_on.description: S* coarse dependencies from the base 07-sequence-reviewed order (aPRD-derived).

real_depends_on.description: S* dependencies projected from the build-dag (discriminator 3); includes completed prerequisites.

depends_on.description: S* dependencies (alias or copy; carried for downstream consumers).

confirmed.description: Coarse deps the real DAG also yields.

removed.description: Coarse deps the real DAG does NOT yield — genuine refinement.

added.description: Real deps absent from the coarse graph.

moved.description: Null if unmoved; otherwise records the position change and basis for it.

from_position.description: Position in the base remaining order before re-rank.

basis.description: Material change that licensed the move — removed/added real dep or value/risk change.

value_risk_change.description: Null, or logged change to retires_risk or value with from/to and specific learning basis.

field.description: Which field changed: retires_risk or value.

to.description: New field value, or null when retires_risk cleared.

basis.description: Specific learning that justified this change.

rationale.description: One line — which real dep freed/held this slice, its value, risk retired; caveman.

dependency_check.description: Dependency validation of re-ranked order against real component DAG.

acyclic.description: True when no dependency cycles in real DAG.

legal.description: Every remaining slice placed after all its real deps and completed prerequisites.

against.description: What the re-rank was validated against (real_component_dag).

cycles.description: Cycle paths when acyclic:false; empty on clean run.

dangling_real_depends_on.description: Real deps referencing slices absent from base sequence; empty on clean run.

reordered.description: S* ids whose position changed vs base remaining order.

slice.description: S* identifier of the slice with refined deps.

removed.description: Coarse deps removed by real DAG.

added.description: Real deps added beyond coarse graph.

value_risk_changes.description: Every logged value_risk_change entry; empty when no changes.

field.description: Which field changed: retires_risk or value.

to.description: New field value, or null when retires_risk cleared.

basis.description: Specific learning that justified this change.

thrash_avoided.description: One line: slices left in base order with no material change.

coverage.description: Coverage accounting: base_slices split into completed + remaining_ranked.

base_slices.description: All S* ids in the base sequence.

remaining_ranked.description: Remaining S* ids in emitted re-ranked order.

missing.description: Base ids neither completed nor ranked; empty on clean run.

duplicated.description: S* ids appearing more than once across completed + remaining; empty on clean run.

structural_defects.description: Cycle/dangling detail when verdict:dependency_defect; empty on clean run.

items.description: One cycle or dangling-dep record; keys determined by defect type.

aprd_defects.description: Bad WHAT learning exposed through implementation; each entry routes to Phase 0.

slice.description: S* id of the slice whose build exposed the aPRD defect.

defect.description: Learning that revealed bad WHAT — ambiguous or wrong aPRD contract.

route.description: Always Phase 0 — routes to Phase 0 change request.

foundation_gaps.description: Foundational surprises revealed by slice build; each entry routes to FOUNDATION-CUT.

slice.description: S* id of the slice whose build revealed the foundation gap.

gap.description: Foundational surprise — un-built foundation component needed by this slice.

route.description: Always FOUNDATION-CUT — routes to widen foundation cut.

rerank_counts.description: Summary counts of this re-rank operation.

reordered.description: Count of remaining slices that moved position.

deps_removed.description: Total coarse dependencies removed by real DAG across all slices.

deps_added.description: Total real dependencies added beyond coarse graph across all slices.
